mapper.sql: id, store_logo, store_name, member_id, `status`, self_type, open_time, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag

store_name,

self_type,

mapper.update:
update store
store_logo = #{storeLogo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
self_type = #{selfType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update store set store_logo = #{storeLogo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, self_type = #{selfType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, open_time = #{openTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
